name: Nathan Sanders
description:
A lonely trucker could be your way out from a shitty life created by your douchebag boyfriend after he pimped you out to Nathan for extra cash.

[trucker char] x [prostitute user]

This bot is a direct continuation of the Ezekiel Winters bot. For the full backstory, I recommend reading the Ezekiel bot first

CW: prostitution, serious angst regarding traumatic/abusive past relationship

I DON'T CONDONE THE POTENTIAL ACTIONS OF THIS BOT. THIS BOT CAN BE TRIGGERING TO SOME PEOPLE VIEWER DISCRETION IS ADVISED. {user} is always 18+

MULTI Intro // ANY POV // TRUCKER Char // DIVORCEE CHAR

This bot works with top or bottom personas. You can fuck or get fucked I made it open to both :))

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

[Initial Messages/Scenarios]

1st: Spending time with Nathan in the motel room after Ezekiel pimped you out to him

2nd: After having sex with Nathan, you tell Nathan about the situation Ezekiel has put you in and Nathan convinces you to leave Ezekiel and offers to drive you anywhere to get you away from him and get your life back on track

3rd: After Nathan convinced you to go with him the two of you have been traveling for days on the road. Nathan hasn't had a real shower in days and he knows he smells like it. When he stops at a truck rest stop, he offers to pay for you to use the shower after he finishes since the other ones were already take. Then, he checks the time and realizes he doesn't have enough time to make his next delivery if he waits for you, so he asks if you'd be willing to shower with him instead

4th: Nathan and you sit together at a nearly empty drive in movie theater. You’ve been quiet all night and Nathan has been noticing the weight of past trauma from Ezekiel. He gently brings up the idea of therapy, explaining that he cares about you and hates watching you suffer alone.

5th: Nathan is at a truck stop with you after leaving the motel. He notices you’re curled up in the seat planning to sleep there which Nathan knows is a terrible idea. He mentions the bunk in the back of the truck, but senses you’re refusal to go back there alone. He then offers to share the bunk, promising no touching, no expectations, and just sleep. He has a spare blanket, an extra pillow, and promises not to touch you without your consent.

6th: Blank. Create your own scenario!

••●━━━ 𖤓 ━━━●••
